title: [060120][TinkerBell]いじケア～ノエルくんのご奉仕日記～
description:
https://vndb.org/v3077  
  
Props to this guy for the upload:  
http://forum.kiss-sub.net/forum.php?mod=viewthread&tid=99936  
  
READ THIS IF YOU ENCOUNTER AN ERROR WHILE INSTALLING  
  
You may not be able to install the game normally if you have a 64 bit OS and so you'll need to install it on a virtual machine running a 32 bit OS like XP. You can follow the below link to get the virtual machine working.  
  
http://www.pcworld.com/article/2139983/compatibility-with-security-how-to-run-windows-xp-in-a-virtual-machine.html  
  
You can get a windows XP iso from somewhere like tpb. While you're installing XP, you may want to check the "Install files for East Asian languages" and select Japanese for "Standards and formats" and "Language for non-Unicode programs" just in case.   
  
Once you're inside the virtual machine you should enable one of your virtual drives (Daemon tools seems to work whereas magicdisc messes up the configuration files) in order to install the game. To do this, simply click "Devices" in the menu bar at the top and choose your virtual drive from "CD/DVD Devices". Whatever you mount will then show up in the CD drive of your virtual machine.   
  
When the installer prompts you for the second disc just mount ijicare\_02.cue.
